LSO-MS6-L2-10001300-MSMATH6-ESC-AAD-01 | MS Math: Grade 6 | Rational Numbers and the Number Line | Escape Room | African & African Diaspora Voices
Left of Zero
Click 🎧 to listen.
Listen to a conversation between two students. The boy is discussing his opinion about an escape room he tried at the African Heritage Festival. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer four questions about the conversation and the evidence the boy gives to support his opinion. As you listen, you may take notes.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1:
Why does the boy mention the giant number line painted on the floor?
2QUESTION 2:
Where did the rule about treating sea level as zero come from?
3QUESTION 3:
What does the boy say about Lake Assal?
4QUESTION 4:
What is the boy's main point about negative numbers?
Answer all 4 questions to submit.
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
